hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'gh pr create' && printf '%s\n' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"MANDATORY: You just ran gh pr create. You MUST arm a Monitor (persistent:true) for this PR in THIS SAME TURN before ending your response. Do NOT end this turn without doing it. Also tell the user in your message: I am subscribed to PR #N and will notify you on merge."}}' || true
